settings.title: Settings
settings.body: Use the menu in the top-right corner to change the language instantly.

main.loading_detail: Your desktop license is being validated securely. Please wait.
main.loading_profile: Loading user profile and subscription details.
main.title: NB PDF TOOLS
main.subtitle: PDF SUITE BY NB GLOBAL STUDIO
main.description: PDF merge, extraction, Office conversion, compression, and encryption in one desktop workspace.
main.login_description: Sign in with your account. License and subscription validation run automatically through the backend.
main.session_expired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
main.license_missing: License data could not be validated yet. Please try signing in again.
main.free_notice: Free plan is active. Encryption, batch processing, and files over {limit_text} MB require Pro. {device_text}. {upgrade_message}
main.active_notice: License is active. All desktop features are available. {device_text}.
main.upgrade_required: Upgrade to Pro to unlock this desktop capability.
main.pro_feature_body: This tool is available for Pro and Business members only. Open the plan upgrade page?
main.subscription_refreshing: Checking subscription status with the server...
main.subscription_returned: Subscription status checked after returning to the app.
main.payment_return_hint: Return to this window after payment. License status can be refreshed automatically or manually.
main.device_blocked: Access is blocked for this device.
main.guest_notice: You can use the desktop app in guest mode for {limit} total operations. Remaining operations: {remaining}. Sign in or create an account whenever you are ready.
main.guest_sign_in_required: Sign in with your account to continue.

merge.note: Drag to reorder or use the arrow buttons on each card. Merge output follows this order.
merge.password_missing_body:
🔐 Enter passwords first for these encrypted PDF files:

{files}

extract.empty_detail: Select a PDF file to get started.
extract.mode_single_info: Selected pages will be saved as one new PDF file.
extract.mode_separate_info: Each selected page will be saved separately to the destination folder.
extract.invalid_format: Enter a valid page list (digits, commas, and ranges with -).
extract.file_read_error:
An error occurred while reading the file:
{error}
extract.invalid_page: Invalid page: The file contains {total} pages.

word.empty: Select a PDF file to get started.

word_to_pdf.empty: Select a Word file to get started.

excel_to_pdf.empty: Select an Excel file to get started.

pdf_to_excel.mode_always: Table preservation mode is always active in this window.
pdf_to_excel.mode_detail: The app prioritizes preserving table structure and adds supporting text transfer when needed.
pdf_to_excel.empty: Select a PDF file to get started.

compress.detail: Compression results vary by document structure; the app aims to balance quality and size.
compress.empty: Select a PDF file to get started.

encrypt.password_detail: This password is used to open the document and should be shared with people who need to view the file.
encrypt.empty: Select a PDF file to get started.

pdf_password.title: PDF Password Required
pdf_password.detail: ℹ️ Enter the PDF password to continue.
pdf_password.allow_skip: If you do not enter a password, you can skip this file.
pdf_password.invalid_password: The entered PDF password is incorrect.

output_security.title: Output Security
output_security.question: How would you like to save the extracted PDF output?
output_security.detail: You can save the output without a password or protect it with a new password.
output_security.missing_password: Enter a password for encrypted save.

contact.description: Send a message to NB Global Studio. We usually reply within one business day.
contact.name: Name
contact.success_body: Your message has been sent successfully
contact.validation_name: Please enter your name (at least 2 characters).
contact.validation_email: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.validation_message: Please enter a message (at least 10 characters).

feedback.config_missing: Support API address is not configured
feedback.handoff_done: Your request has been forwarded to an operator. It will be answered shortly.
